items.title: Ed Woodham in All the Odd Places
items.summary: The beloved artist and public art champion discusses his work, activism, and queerness in an interview with Hyperallergic.

items.title: Hyperallergic’s Art Tarotscope for the Summer Solstice
items.summary: Amid global turmoil and rising temperatures, I’ve seen creative friends hitting periods of stagnancy. What will help us return to a flow state?

items.title: Every Dog Has Its Artist
items.summary: A compassionate new book explores how canine companions across Western art history break down the emotional boundaries between species.

items.title: Misan Harriman to Step Down From Southbank Centre
items.summary: Thousands had expressed their support for the artist and activist after right-wing tabloids accused him of antisemitism.
